meta.title: Sports Medicine Practice Software | Injury RTM & Return-to-Play Tracking | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to sports medicine practice operations. $7,800/month in injury RTM. Return-to-play protocols. Concussion management. Team coverage coordination.

hero.subhead: Your athletes already track recovery — that's billable RTM. Your return-to-play protocols need systematic tracking. Your concussions need monitoring. clinIQ captures sports medicine RTM, tracks return-to-play, and manages athletic injuries.

sections.content:
Sports medicine practices manage acute injuries, chronic conditions, and return-to-play decisions across diverse athletic populations.

**The recovery monitoring opportunity:**

Athletes are highly motivated to track recovery. Pain, function, activity tolerance — this data informs return-to-play decisions and qualifies for RTM.

60 injury patients × $130/month = $7,800/month in RTM.

Athletes benefit from systematic recovery tracking.

**What athletes track:**
- Pain with activity
- Range of motion
- Strength and function
- Activity tolerance
- PT compliance

**What clinIQ does:**

Sport-specific templates: Different tracking for different injuries.

Milestone tracking: Recovery milestones documented.

Return-to-play readiness: Objective criteria tracked.

Return-to-play decisions require systematic documentation.

**What clinIQ does:**

Protocol tracking: Return-to-play protocol stages documented.

Criteria completion: Objective criteria met at each stage.

Clearance documentation: Return-to-play clearance documented.

Concussion protocols require careful tracking.

**What clinIQ does:**

Symptom tracking: Headache, cognitive symptoms, balance, sleep.

Return-to-learn/play: Gradual return protocols tracked.

Baseline comparison: Post-injury compared to baseline when available.

For practices with team coverage responsibilities.

**What clinIQ does:**

Event coverage: Game/practice coverage scheduled.

Injury reporting: Injuries documented per team.

Communication: Coordination with coaches and athletic trainers.

**Week 1-2:** Injury RTM, return-to-play protocols, concussion management configured.

**ROI:** RTM revenue $93,600/year. Better return-to-play documentation.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.a: Yes. Injury recovery monitoring qualifies for musculoskeletal RTM codes.
Protocol stages documented. Objective criteria at each stage. Clearance documented.

testimonial.quote: Athletes love tracking their recovery. They're more compliant with restrictions when they see progress.
